MIXSOON Bean Cleansing Oil 195ml: A Hydrating and Gentle Face Cleanser from Korea

Are you looking for a gentle yet effective face cleanser that will leave your skin feeling soft and clean? Look no further than the MIXSOON Bean Cleansing Oil 195ml. This product is a 100% authentic Korean product, verified by Emart for its quality and efficacy.

What is it:

The MIXSOON Bean Cleansing Oil is a hydrating and gentle face cleanser that is designed to clean and care for the skin. It is suitable for all skin types, including dry, sensitive, and normal skin. This product is free from harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances, making it a great option for those who want a natural and gentle skincare routine.

Key Benefits & Ingredients:

  • Bean extract: Hydrates and nourishes the skin
  • Camellia oil: Moisturizes and softens the skin
  • Glycerin: Helps to retain moisture in the skin

How to Use:

  1. Dispense a small amount of the cleanser onto your palm
  2. Massage onto your face in a circular motion
  3. Rinse with lukewarm water
  4. Pat dry with a towel
  5. Follow up with your regular skincare routine

Why Buy from Emart:

At Emart, we take pride in our commitment to providing 100% authentic Emart-verified products to our customers. Our products are carefully selected and verified to ensure their quality and efficacy. Plus, with our fast Dhaka 1-2 day delivery and Cash on Delivery option, you can shop with us from the comfort of your own home.
